description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that sets the default Docker image to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE/base:$CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH, applies a retry policy of up to 2 attempts for runner_system_failure, scheduler_failure, stale_schedule, unmet_prerequisites, and stuck_or_timeout_failure, and runs on runners tagged gitlab-org. Include the listed local and remote YAML files (e.g., .gitlab-ci-asdf-versions.yml, .gitlab/ci/templates.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/test.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/trace.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/automation.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/chatops.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/metrics.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/auto-build.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/auto-deploy.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/coordinated-pipeline.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/mirror-status.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/post-deploy-migrations-pipeline.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/workflow.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/internal/*.yml, .gitlab/ci/monthly/*.yml, .gitlab/ci/security/*.yml, .gitlab/ci/pre-deploy.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/release_environment.gitlab-ci.yml, renovate-bot.yml, docker.yml, .gitlab-ci-other-versions.yml, danger.yml, .gitlab/ci/docker-images.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/secrets.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/shared-ops-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/shared-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/protected-ops-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml, .gitlab/ci/protected-vault-tokens.gitlab-ci.yml) which define jobs across a comprehensive list of stages such as validate, renovate_bot, build_images, test, build, coverage, coordinated:*, automation, chatops, metrics, mirror_status, internal_release:*, monthly_release:*, security_release:*, post_deploy:*, pre:*, and release_environment. Define a variable TEST_IMAGE_TAG equal to $CI_DEFAULT_BRANCH. Ensure that all jobs inherit the default image, retry settings, and runner tags, and that any conditional rules in the included files (e.g., only on gitlab.com or ops.gitlab.net) are respected. No explicit jobs are defined in this file; all jobs are provided by the includes.
